hero.title: Intelligent Grid-Scale Energy Storage.
hero.subtitle: We develop and operate high-capacity Commercial & Industrial BESS infrastructure. Algorithmic grid orchestration for energy independence and risk-mitigated returns.
hero.placeholder: [3D Twinmotion Render Placeholder: C&I BESS Installation]

value.title: Core Operational Value
value.subtitle: Algorithmic management of C&I battery infrastructure yields three distinct financial and operational advantages.
value.cost_body: Deploying peak shaving algorithms to mitigate tariff spikes and optimize daily consumption profiles.
value.resilience_body: Providing localized grid independence and continuous power supply to protect against macro-grid volatility.
value.revenue_body: Monetizing capacity through Frequency Containment Reserves (FCR) and automated energy arbitrage.

infra.battery_body: Engineered to premium Danish standards, our battery systems integrate with absolute physical and operational security. We deploy scalable, footprint-optimized hardware designed specifically for commercial and industrial environments.
infra.market_body: Intelligent grid orchestration actively manages energy flows to generate measurable returns. Our algorithms autonomously execute peak shaving, energy arbitrage, and Frequency Containment Reserves (FCR).
infra.about_body: ZynexGroup accelerates the green transition through transparency, operational clarity, and robust institutional backing. We build long-term infrastructure partnerships grounded in raw data and reliable engineering.

divider.headline: Engineered for Absolute Stability.

battery_page.hero_subtitle: Modular, high-density C&I Battery Energy Storage Systems. Engineered in Denmark for optimal footprint-to-power ratios and absolute physical security.
battery_page.hero_placeholder: [3D CAD Render: Exploded View of Battery Enclosure]
battery_page.safety_point2: Cell-level telemetry and thermal runaway mitigation.
battery_page.footprint_body: Our BESS architecture minimizes physical disruption. Systems are designed for rapid deployment on existing industrial lots, concrete pads, or integrated facility perimeters without requiring structural building modifications.
